selection_rule: The known q021 join failure plus the first frozen Mark query for each remaining distinct shape: procedural, naive, list, single_fact, and followup.
invariants: Frozen questions, prompts, scoring, expected documents, and overlap guard remain unchanged.
OFF and ON use the same tier, model contract, query order, and corpus.
Selected source identities are byte-equivalent between arms.
Every emitted anchor has exact sentence, claim, source-version, and selected-source ownership closure.
No corpus-bearing Mongo collection changes during either arm.
